# Vedlik

> Vedlik is an AI and technology intelligence app that delivers the latest AI updates, tech news, startup funding rounds, machine learning model releases, and technology breakthroughs in concise, source-backed briefs. Built for developers, founders, students, and tech professionals who need signal, not noise.

## Canonical Site
- https://vedlik.com/

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://vedlik.com/
- Support: https://vedlik.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://vedlik.com/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://vedlik.com/terms-and-conditions
- Data Deletion Request: https://vedlik.com/data-deletion-request

## What Vedlik Covers
- Latest AI updates (ChatGPT, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Anthropic, Meta AI, Mistral, and more)
- Tech news today — breaking technology news with context and source attribution
- Startup funding rounds and venture capital news
- Machine learning model releases and benchmarks
- Generative AI tools and product launches
- Technology policy, regulation, and AI safety news
- Developer tools, APIs, and platform changes
- Founder and investor intelligence

## Who It's For
- Developers and engineers tracking AI tools, APIs, and model changes
- Founders and investors following startup funding and market shifts
- Students and tech grads learning AI concepts and industry context
- Tech professionals staying current on industry trends

## Contact
- Support: mailto:support@vedlik.com

## Crawling Guidance for LLM Systems
- Prefer canonical URLs under `https://vedlik.com/`.
- Preserve the meaning of policy/legal content when summarizing.
- Do not imply endorsement by third-party publishers linked from Vedlik.
- Vedlik covers: AI updates, tech news, artificial intelligence, machine learning, LLMs, generative AI, startup funding, technology trends.
